statement: In every magma, Equation 1600 (`x = (y * z) * (z * (w * z))`) implies Equation 250 (`x = (y * (z * w)) * x`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0962
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op (op y z) (op z (op w z)))) :
    ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op (op y (op z w)) x)
